title: SpyFu Competitors API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for SpyFu Competitors API API responses

CompetitorsApi_GetTopPpcCompetitors_GET.title: Get Top PPC Competitors
CompetitorsApi_GetTopPpcCompetitors_GET.description: Response wrapper containing competitor analysis data for a specific search channel (SEO or PPC) with pagination metadata.

totalMatchingResults.description: Total number of competitor domains available that match the query criteria, including results not included in the current page.

results.description: Array of competitor domains ranked by keyword overlap strength in the specified search channel.

domain.description: Domain name of the competitor that shares significant keyword overlap in the specified search channel (SEO or PPC).

commonTerms.description: Number of unique keywords that both this competitor domain and the target domain compete for in the same search channel.

rank.description: The rank is a metric for how much overlap there is between your domain and the competitor

items.description: Represents a competitor domain with shared keyword overlap data, indicating the strength of competitive relationship in either paid or organic search.

CompetitorsApi_GetTopSeoCompetitors_GET.title: Get Top SEO Competitors
CompetitorsApi_GetTopSeoCompetitors_GET.description: Response wrapper containing competitor analysis data for a specific search channel (SEO or PPC) with pagination metadata.

totalMatchingResults.description: Total number of competitor domains available that match the query criteria, including results not included in the current page.

results.description: Array of competitor domains ranked by keyword overlap strength in the specified search channel.

domain.description: Domain name of the competitor that shares significant keyword overlap in the specified search channel (SEO or PPC).

commonTerms.description: Number of unique keywords that both this competitor domain and the target domain compete for in the same search channel.

rank.description: The rank is a metric for how much overlap there is between your domain and the competitor

items.description: Represents a competitor domain with shared keyword overlap data, indicating the strength of competitive relationship in either paid or organic search.

CompetitorsApi_GetCombinedTopCompetitors.title: Get Combined Top Competitors
CompetitorsApi_GetCombinedTopCompetitors.description: Response wrapper containing comprehensive competitor analysis data across both paid and organic search channels with pagination metadata.

totalMatchingResults.description: Total number of competitor domains available that match the query criteria, including results not included in the current page.

combinedCompetitors.description: Array of competitor domains ranked by combined SEO and PPC keyword overlap strength.

rank.description: Competitive ranking score indicating the strength of overlap between this competitor and the target domain across both SEO and PPC keywords.

domain.description: Domain name of the competitor that shares significant keyword overlap in both paid and organic search results.

items.description: Represents a competitor domain that competes for similar keywords in both paid and organic search, ranked by competitive overlap strength.

ppcCompetitors.description: Array of competitor domains ranked by paid search advertising keyword overlap and competitive strength.

domain.description: Domain name of the competitor that shares significant keyword overlap in the specified search channel (SEO or PPC).

commonTerms.description: Number of unique keywords that both this competitor domain and the target domain compete for in the same search channel.

rank.description: The rank is a metric for how much overlap there is between your domain and the competitor

items.description: Represents a competitor domain with shared keyword overlap data, indicating the strength of competitive relationship in either paid or organic search.

seoCompetitors.description: Array of competitor domains ranked by organic search keyword overlap and SEO competitive strength.

domain.description: Domain name of the competitor that shares significant keyword overlap in the specified search channel (SEO or PPC).

commonTerms.description: Number of unique keywords that both this competitor domain and the target domain compete for in the same search channel.

rank.description: The rank is a metric for how much overlap there is between your domain and the competitor

items.description: Represents a competitor domain with shared keyword overlap data, indicating the strength of competitive relationship in either paid or organic search.
